title: Ability to Archive Entire folders
excerpt:

posts.author: lvelez115 (Luis Velez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would like the ability to archive entire folders.
Example: I have all circular production pages done for 2021 in a 2021 folder with Weekly work folders within. It is very cumbersome to archive each job individually. It would be much easier to Archive an entire folder.
